title: [全球霸權] BBC: 中國綁架印度公民

replies.msg:
睇新聞學英文，星期一至五早晚簡單翻譯啲外國報導，等大家可以雙語吸收資訊，學多啲英文尤其係咁多位DSE仔女

希望睇完幫手Like+推，鍾意就Dog/follow埋我
--------------------------------------------------

https://www.bbc.com/news/world-asia-india-54053111
India lawmaker says China kidnapped civilians

//Tensions are rising between Delhi and Beijing amid reports that Chinese troops kidnapped five Indian civilians in a border state last week. //
「德里同北京嘅關係變得緊張，同一時間有消息指，上星期中國軍隊喺邊境地區綁走五個印度公民。」

Tension 解緊張關係/局勢, 配以rise/grow/heighten (升溫) 或者 ease/relieve/reduce (降溫) 使用。


//The allegation was first tweeted on 5 September by an Indian lawmaker from Arunachal Pradesh state. //
「呢個指控係由印度阿魯納恰爾邦嘅議員喺9月5日首次發tweet。」


//Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Zhao Lijian added that Beijing "has never recognised so-called 'Arunachal Pradesh', which is China's south Tibet region". //
「中國外交部發言人趙立堅補充話，北京從來冇承認到所謂阿魯納恰爾邦，呢個邦同時喺中國嘅藏南地區。」

中國一直都拒絕承認阿魯納恰爾邦嘅合法性，會加引號(「阿魯納恰爾邦」) 稱呼佢。兩國喺邊界交接區加強基礎建設，同埋會搞民族節日增強自己合法性。
Keyword: McMahon Line 麥克馬洪線、中印邊境戰爭


//"We have no details to release yet about question on Indian army sending a message to PLA about five missing Indians in the region," he said. //
「我地仲未有詳細資料關於印軍向解放軍表示有5個印度人喺嗰個地區失蹤要公開。」


//The abduction allegation comes in the wake of rising tensions between the neighbours. //
「喺呢個鄰居關係越發緊張之時，綁架指控隨之而來。」


//Both countries regularly accuse each other of instigating the fight in the Himalayan region of Ladakh by crossing the border, a poorly demarcated line that snakes through the inhospitable terrain.//
「兩國經常指責對方喺喜瑪拉雅山Ladakh地區撩事鬥非，跨越呢條畫得又差，又難以居住嘅地區蜿蜒嘅分界線。」


//Despite several rounds of military and diplomatic talks, the nuclear-armed neighbours have failed to resolve their border disputes. //
「即使舉行過幾場軍事同埋外交會面，呢兩個擁核嘅鄰居依然未能解決佢地嘅邊界紛爭。」

Resolve係百搭又好用嘅字，喺呢度有 解決 嘅意思。Solve又係解決，resolve又係解決，非常好記，同義詞有 settle, sort out, work out, fix, address, tackle, deal with, grapple with.

希望睇完幫手Like+推，鍾意就Dog/follow埋我

簡單講
Solve多數係解決啲logical既問題, e.g. solve the math problem, solve the dilemma

Resolve就解決emotional 既問題, e.g. resolve the conflict, resolve the dispute, 而resolve做名詞有「解決問題既決心」意思。雖然有啲情況佢地都互通意思，但就主要係呢個分別
